message:
test(style): Expand color module test coverage (bd-10i.11)

30 new tests (was 8) covering: ColorProfile flags and supports_true_color,
Rgb key uniqueness and BT.709 luminance, Ansi16 round-trip and boundary
values, rgb_to_256 for all primaries, ansi256_to_rgb palette/grayscale/cube
corners, full downgrade chain (RGB->256->16->Mono for all paths),
Color::to_rgb all variants, ColorCache overflow/clear behavior and
minimum capacity enforcement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
